scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @agent/api && npm run build -w @agent/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @agent/api && npm run test -w @agent/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @agent/api && npm run typecheck -w @agent/web
